description_long: This is a large, rectangular steel shipping container with corrugated sides and a dark gray finish. The container features reinforced corners and vertical locking bars on its double front doors, which are secured with heavy-duty latches. Both long sides display a prominent yellow scorpion emblem, adding a distinctive visual element. The surface is matte with visible wear and subtle weathering, suggesting outdoor use. Small white alphanumeric markings are present near the top corners, likely for identification. The container is robust and designed for secure storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, dark gray steel shipping container with corrugated sides, double front doors, and a yellow scorpion emblem on each long side.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors with vertical locking bars, latches, and small white markings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the yellow scorpion emblem centered on the corrugated metal surface.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, with double doors and locking mechanisms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also featuring the yellow scorpion emblem on the corrugated surface.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: yellow scorpion emblem on both long sides, small white alphanumeric markings near top corners
attribute_handles_or_grips: vertical locking bars and latches on front doors
